name: GolfCave
about: GolfCave is a 24/7 indoor golf facility providing golfers of all skill levels with the ability to play or practice in the privacy of their own 'Cave'. The venue utilizes world's most accurate golf simulator, TrackMan, to offer an immersive experience. Golfers can play on over 250+ renowned golf courses, practice with real-time metrics, and receive personalized coaching. The facility offers a range of services including private lessons, club fittings with Club Champion, and various events and tournaments, making it a versatile destination for both serious practice and social play.
why_golfers_like_it: Private 'Cave' rooms for uninterrupted practice and play
Advanced TrackMan technology for precise swing and ball data
Ability to play on over 250+ famous golf courses worldwide
BYOB policy allowing food and drinks for a relaxed experience

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art radar launch monitor providing detailed ball and club data

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you are expected to bring your own golf clubs to use at GolfCave.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, GolfCave operates on a BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverage) policy, allowing you to bring your own food and drinks.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing 18 holes typically takes about 2-3 hours, depending on the pace of play and the number of players in your bay.

faq.question: Is GolfCave kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GolfCave is kid-friendly and offers a family-friendly environment suitable for golfers of all ages and skill levels.
